title: Mezoneuron schlechteri
taxonomy: Mezoneuron schlechteri is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the genus Mezoneuron and is native to Madagascar. The plant is a type of legume, characterized by its distinctive flowers and pods. Mezoneuron schlechteri is further classified as a member of the subfamily Caesalpinioideae. Its classification is part of the broader system of plant taxonomy.

The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues.
